$notes.domain_metadata_user_domain: User-controlled domains have names without the delta. prefix. Readers that choose to support domainMetadata must apply Action Reconciliation and include all domains — including user domains — in the snapshot. Writers must preserve user-controlled domains they do not understand.

cases.name: domain_metadata_read_snapshot_1_7_feature_listed_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a (1,7)+[domainMetadata] table succeeds; domainMetadata imposes no mandatory reader obligations — readers that choose to support it must apply Action Reconciliation, but readers that do not are not required to fail.

cases.name: domain_metadata_read_snapshot_1_7_with_user_domain_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a (1,7)+[domainMetadata] table that already has a user-controlled domain action in the log succeeds; readers must apply Action Reconciliation and include the user domain in the snapshot.

cases.name: domain_metadata_empty_commit_1_7_with_user_domain_succeeds
cases.description: Appending to a (1,7)+[domainMetadata] table that already has a user-controlled domain action in the log succeeds; writers must preserve all domains they do not understand.
